reference: Moderate dyskaryosis. I have just been informed from my smear test last week that I have abnormal cells. Six years ago, the same happened, and I had to have three-quarters of my cervix removed. All has been fine, and now it has happened again, and I am now really concerned. Does this mean I could have cervical cancer? Is it true that abnormal cells can be caused by my partner's sperm?
text: Moderate dyscariosis. I have just been informed from my smear test last week that I have abnormal cells. Six years ago, the same happened, and I had to have three-quarters of my cervix removed. All has been fine, and now it has happened again, and I am now really concerned. Does this mean I could have cervical cancer? Is it true that abnormal cells can be caused by my partner's sperm?
